name: infinitecampus-mcp
description: Infinite Campus (Campus Parent) MCP — single-account with CUPS auto-discovery. Two auth paths: IC_USERNAME/IC_PASSWORD, or sign in via the fetchproxy browser extension.

ic_base_url.title: Portal base URL (https://...)
ic_base_url.description: Campus Parent portal base URL, e.g. https://campus.springfield.k12.example.us

ic_district.title: District app name
ic_district.description: Infinite Campus district app name (the appName path segment in the portal URL).

ic_username.title: Username (optional with fetchproxy)
ic_username.description: Campus Parent portal username. Leave blank to use the fetchproxy 0.3.0 browser extension fallback — sign into your IC portal in the browser and the MCP captures the session cookies automatically.

ic_password.title: Password (optional with fetchproxy)
ic_password.description: Campus Parent portal password. Required only when username is set. Leave blank to use the fetchproxy fallback.

ic_name.title: Display name (optional)
ic_name.description: Friendly name for the district (e.g. "Springfield"). Defaults to the district app name if not set.

tools.name: ic_list_districts
tools.description: List configured Infinite Campus districts (names and base URLs)

tools.name: ic_list_students
tools.description: List students enrolled under the parent account

tools.name: ic_get_schedule
tools.description: Get a student's class schedule for a given date

tools.name: ic_list_assignments
tools.description: List a student's assignments, optionally filtered by date or course

tools.name: ic_list_grades
tools.description: List a student's term grades and in-progress course grades

tools.name: ic_list_attendance
tools.description: List a student's absences and tardies (per-course summary by term)

tools.name: ic_list_behavior
tools.description: List a student's behavior events and referrals

tools.name: ic_list_food_service
tools.description: List a student's lunch balance and recent food-service transactions

tools.name: ic_list_messages
tools.description: List parent-visible messages, inbox items, and portal announcements

tools.name: ic_get_message
tools.description: Fetch and parse the HTML body of an inbox message

tools.name: ic_list_documents
tools.description: List a student's available documents (report cards, transcripts, schedules)

tools.name: ic_download_document
tools.description: Download a student's document (PDF) to disk

tools.name: ic_list_school_days
tools.description: List a student's instructional calendar days grouped by term

tools.name: ic_list_attendance_events
tools.description: List individual attendance events (absences, tardies, early releases) for a student

tools.name: ic_list_recent_grades
tools.description: List recently-graded assignments for a student

tools.name: ic_list_teachers
tools.description: List a student's teachers and assigned counselor(s)

tools.name: ic_list_assessments
tools.description: List a student's standardized test scores (state, national, district)

tools.name: ic_list_fees
tools.description: List a student's fee assignments and running balance

tools.name: ic_get_features
tools.description: List the district's feature-flag allow-list for each of a student's enrollments
